creative.concept: Builder's stats card — raw honest numbers from 62 days of shipping. '$0 raised' in red against a giant '142' is the scroll-stopper; the stats row reframes Jot as a solo-developer achievement, not a corporate product.

cards.title: Day 62: 142 downloads. $0 raised. 1 builder.
cards.use: Primary visual for LinkedIn, X, and Instagram today. Export as 1080×1080 PNG. The red '$0 raised' is the punchline that makes readers look twice.

storyboard.title: Dictating an email reply
storyboard.use: Instagram Reel / X video / GIF — shows Jot in a real email workflow; hits writers and professionals who spend hours in Mail or Gmail

shots.visual: Mail.app open with a long email thread; cursor blinking in empty reply compose field
Hand presses ⌥Space; Dynamic Island-style pill appears under Mac notch
User speaks a reply aloud; pill shows pulsing audio waveform
Full reply text appears in Mail compose; pill vanishes; send button visible

drafts.text:
62 days ago I shipped v1.0.

142 people downloaded it. No paid ads. No App Store listing.

It's a free, open-source Mac dictation app: press a hotkey, speak, the transcript lands wherever your cursor is — all on your Mac's Neural Engine.

Building in public means publishing the real numbers. The download counter is on GitHub.

What do you use to take voice notes on your Mac?

#indiedev #macOS #buildinpublic
drafts.note: Attach builder-stats.svg (export as 1080×1080 PNG). Do NOT put the link in the post body — LinkedIn downranks posts with external links. Paste the utm_url as the FIRST COMMENT immediately after posting. The closing question is the engagement trigger.

drafts.note: Attach builder-stats.svg (export as PNG). No link in post body — post the utm_url as the first reply immediately after posting. ~123 characters.

drafts.text:
62 days building a free on-device Mac dictation app — here's where I'm at

Building in public means posting the actual numbers.

v1.0 shipped April 16. Today is day 62. 142 total downloads via GitHub Releases. 27 versions shipped. $0 raised.

Jot is a free, open-source Mac dictation app: press a hotkey (I use ⌥ Space), speak, and the transcript pastes wherever your cursor is — in any text field on macOS. No window switching.

Under the hood: Parakeet TDT running on the Apple Neural Engine. Transcription is entirely on-device — no audio leaves your Mac, no internet needed after the one-time model download, no account required.

Optional extras: AI cleanup via Apple Intelligence (on-device, macOS 26+), Ollama, or your own API key. Rewrite-with-voice lets you select text, press a hotkey, speak an instruction ('make this shorter', 'translate to Spanish'), and Jot rewrites in place. There's also an iOS companion app on the App Store.

Biggest surprises from 62 days of building:
- On-device vs cloud isn't just a privacy argument — it's a latency argument. No server round-trip means text lands fast.
- Nobody has complained about Parakeet's ~150-word limit. People naturally pause.
- The clipboard sandwich (save, write, paste, restore) has more edge cases than I expected.

Apple Silicon only, macOS 14+. Open source on GitHub.

(I built this — disclosure)

Link in comments.

drafts.note: recommended:true — last recommended instagram was June 14 (3 days ago); threshold of 3+ days met today (June 17). Caption links aren't clickable on Instagram — keep the utm_url (utm_source=instagram) in your bio permanently.

notes: Downloads hit 142 (+14 from June 16's 128, avg7=8/day) — the strongest single-day delta since the June 13 spike, clearly driven by Show HN traffic from yesterday. v1.14.1 jumped from ~15 to 23 downloads since June 16; older releases also ticked up. New free competitor 'Resonant' (onresonant.com) appeared in multiple 2026 Mac dictation roundups that exclude Jot — their site publishes 'Best Dictation Apps Mac 2026' and 'VoiceInk Alternative' articles that rank highly in search; this should be the first outreach target when the window reopens June 19. iTunes API returned 403 for the third consecutive day; appstore.json not updated, existing values preserved (date: 2026-06-17, ratingCount: 3, avgRating: 5.0). No actionable Reddit/HN forum threads found today. Outreach window reopens June 19.
